caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario taking place in a hospital setting, specifically focusing on "Day 4 Cooling & CRT Post Arrest" as part of a "Sim Week" event. A team of healthcare professionals, dressed in blue scrubs and wearing masks and gloves, is gathered around a patient lying on a gurney. The medical staff appears to be performing a procedure or treatment, with one individual holding a device near the patient's chest. The environment is well-equipped with medical supplies and equipment visible in the background, indicating a realistic training exercise aimed at enhancing emergency response skills. The scene captures the urgency and coordination required in critical care situations.
